message:
feat(core): add robot_envelope module; fix vc_export, subprocess_bridge, outcome

New module:
- robot_envelope.rs: Generic RobotEnvelope<T> wrapper with timestamp,
  source identifier, and degraded flag for structured machine-facing
  responses. Includes full test suite (312 lines).

Fixes:
- vc_export: fixture_vc_export() now returns (TempDir, VcExport) to
  prevent premature temp directory cleanup that caused intermittent
  test failures. Tests updated to capture _dir binding.
- subprocess_bridge: Fix test that incorrectly used shell -c with
  embedded -- syntax. Now properly passes arguments as separate
  args and asserts argc == 2.
- outcome: Add #[must_use] to trace_non_ok() to prevent callers from
  accidentally discarding results after tracing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
